input_schema.description: A cat photograph to evaluate for subject clarity — whether the cat is in focus, visually distinct, and immediately recognizable as the center of the image.
A cat photograph to evaluate for focus distinction — whether the cat is rendered more sharply than its surroundings.
A cat photograph to evaluate for subject prominence — how much visual weight the cat carries within the frame through its scale and placement.
A cat photograph to evaluate for visual isolation — how cleanly the cat separates from its background and from competing visual elements.

description: Scores how clearly a cat registers as the subject of a photograph. Evaluates three dimensions — focus distinction, subject prominence, and visual isolation — to measure whether the cat is immediately and undeniably the center of the image without requiring the viewer to search for it.
